SEARCH

Uses of Class
com.nib.commons.io.FileIOResponse

Packages that use FileIOResponse
Package
Description
com.nib.commons.io
Provides core Input/Output (I/O) components and abstractions for handling various file organizations and access methods.
com.nib.commons.io.vsam
Provides classes and interfaces for emulating VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) file organizations.
com.nib.scripting.utils.dbutils
DB API
com.nib.scripting.utils.nibsort
SORT

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FileIOResponse
    FileIOResponse.atEnd(FileIOResponse.ConditionDelegate delegate)
    Executes the delegate function if the EOF condition has been raised
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractFile.close()
    Closes the file if it is currently open.
    FileIOResponse
    SequentialFile.close()
    Closes the file, releasing associated resources.
    FileIOResponse
    FileIOResponse.invalidKey(FileIOResponse.ConditionDelegate delegate)
    Executes the delegate function if the invalid key condition has been raised
    FileIOResponse
    FileIOResponse.notAtEnd(FileIOResponse.ConditionDelegate delegate)
    Executes the delegate function if the EOF condition has not been raised
    FileIOResponse
    FileIOResponse.notInvalidKey(FileIOResponse.ConditionDelegate delegate)
    Executes the delegate function if the invalid key condition has not been raised
    FileIOResponse
    FileIOResponse.onFailure(FileIOResponse.ConditionDelegate delegate)
    Executes the delegate function if operation was not successfull
    FileIOResponse
    FileIOResponse.onSuccess(FileIOResponse.ConditionDelegate delegate)
    Executes the delegate function if operation was successfull
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractFile.open(OpenMode openMode)
    Opens a file with the specified open mode and a default lock mode of Shared.
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractFile.open(OpenMode openMode, LockMode lockMode)
    Opens a file with the specified open and lock modes.
    FileIOResponse
    SequentialFile.open(OpenMode openMode)
    Opens the file in the specified open mode, delegating to the open(OpenMode, LockMode) method with a shared lock mode.
    FileIOResponse
    SequentialFile.open(OpenMode openMode, LockMode lockMode)
    Opens the file with the specified open mode and lock mode, initializing the I/O API accordingly.
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractFile.printLine(String format, Object... args)
    Formats the input string using the specified format and arguments, converts it to an appropriate character encoding based on the storage configuration, and writes the formatted line to file.
    FileIOResponse
    SequentialFile.read()
    Reads the next record from the file without locking.
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractFile.readNext()
    Reads the next available record.
    abstract FileIOResponse
    AbstractFile.readNext(boolean lock)
    Reads the next available record from the file.
    FileIOResponse

    Reads the next record into the specified field.
    FileIOResponse

    Simulates reading the next record.
    FileIOResponse

    Reads the next record from the file, optionally applying a lock.
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractFile.readPrev()
    Reads the previous record in the file.
    abstract FileIOResponse
    AbstractFile.readPrev(boolean lock)
    Reads the previous record in the file.
    FileIOResponse
    DummyFile.readPrev(boolean lock)
    Simulates reading the previous record.
    FileIOResponse
    SequentialFile.readPrev(boolean lock)
    Reads the previous record from the file, optionally applying a lock.
    protected FileIOResponse
    AbstractFile.reopen()
    Reopens a file with the previously specified open mode and lock mode.
    abstract FileIOResponse

    Writes a record to the underlying file.

    Writes data from the specified AbstractNField to a file.

    Writes the record from the specified field for teh specified length

    Simulates writing a record.
    FileIOResponse

    Writes the current record to the file.

    Writes data to the file after advancing based on the provided parameter.
    FileIOResponse
    SequentialFile.writeAfter(Advancing advancing, AbstractNField from)
    Writes data to the file after performing an operation on the provided record field and advancing according to the specified advancing behavior.
    FileIOResponse
    SequentialFile.writeAfter(Advancing advancing, AbstractNField from, int reclen)
    Writes data to the file after performing operations on the provided record field and advancing based on the specified advancing behavior and record length.

    FileIOResponse

    Reads a record from the file based on the specified relative record number (RRN) and an equality condition, with no update applied during the operation.
